_comment: Hand-curated safety data for airlines commonly flying UK to Philippines. Ratings are on a 1-7 scale in the style of AirlineRatings.com safety ratings. euBanned = on the EU Air Safety List. Last reviewed: 2026-07.

Emirates.notes: Excellent safety record. Typical route via Dubai, 1 stop.

Qatar Airways.notes: Excellent safety record, multiple Skytrax Airline of the Year awards. Via Doha, 1 stop.

Singapore Airlines.notes: One of the safest airlines in the world. Via Singapore, 1 stop.

Cathay Pacific.notes: Excellent safety record. Via Hong Kong, 1 stop.

EVA Air.notes: Excellent safety record, no fatal accidents in its history. Via Taipei, 1 stop.

Philippine Airlines.notes: Flag carrier of the Philippines. Operates the only direct LHR-MNL flights. Solid modern safety record.

KLM.notes: Very strong safety record. Via Amsterdam, usually 2 stops to PH.

Air France.notes: Strong safety record. Via Paris, usually 2 stops to PH.

British Airways.notes: Very strong safety record. No direct PH flights; codeshares via partner hubs.

Etihad Airways.notes: Excellent safety record. Via Abu Dhabi, 1 stop.

Turkish Airlines.notes: Good safety record in the modern era. Via Istanbul, 1 stop.

Saudia.notes: Good modern safety record. Via Jeddah/Riyadh, 1 stop. Often among the cheapest.

Oman Air.notes: Excellent safety record. Via Muscat, 1 stop.

Gulf Air.notes: Good modern safety record. Via Bahrain, 1 stop.

Malaysia Airlines.notes: Modern fleet and IOSA certified. Via Kuala Lumpur, 1 stop.

Thai Airways.notes: Good modern safety record. Via Bangkok, 1 stop.

Korean Air.notes: Excellent modern safety record. Via Seoul, 1 stop.

Asiana Airlines.notes: Good modern safety record, merging with Korean Air. Via Seoul, 1 stop.

Japan Airlines.notes: Excellent modern safety record. Via Tokyo, 1 stop.

ANA.notes: Excellent safety record. Via Tokyo, 1 stop.

Vietnam Airlines.notes: Good modern safety record. Via Hanoi/Ho Chi Minh City, 1 stop.

China Southern.notes: Good safety record. Via Guangzhou, 1 stop. Often the cheapest option.

China Eastern.notes: One fatal accident in 2022 (flight MU5735). Via Shanghai, 1 stop. Often very cheap.

Air China.notes: Good modern safety record. Via Beijing, 1 stop.

Xiamen Air.notes: Good safety record, no fatal accidents. Via Xiamen, 1 stop.

Cebu Pacific.notes: Philippine low-cost carrier, mainly for domestic connections (e.g. MNL-CEB). No fatal jet accidents.

Lufthansa.notes: Very strong safety record. Via Frankfurt/Munich, usually 2 stops to PH.

Swiss.notes: Very strong safety record. Via Zurich, usually 2 stops to PH.

Finnair.notes: Excellent safety record, no fatal accidents since 1963. Via Helsinki.

Scoot.notes: Singapore Airlines' low-cost subsidiary. Good safety record. Via Singapore.

Air India.notes: Fatal accident in 2025 (AI171). Fleet being modernised under Tata ownership. Via Delhi/Mumbai.
